name: swap
description: Swap tokens on the same chain or cross-chain. Returns a quote; add --yes to execute.

from_token.description: Token symbol to sell (e.g. ETH, USDC)

to_token.description: Token symbol to buy (e.g. PEPE, USDC)

amount.description: Amount of from_token to swap (in human-readable units)

execute.description: Set true to execute the swap (default: quote only)
